zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hill於大約1469年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特豪德斯同時，她的父親Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset49歲，母親Alice Stourton6歲。她於1484年與Hugh Luttrell在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1508年1月之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特，埋葬在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hill was born about 1469, in Houndstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, was 49 and her mother, Alice Stourton, was 6. She married Hugh Luttrell in 1484, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died before January 1508, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hill est née environ 1469, à Houndstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Alice Stourton, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Luttrell en 1484, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant janvier 1508, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Hill um 1469 in Houndstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset 49 und ihre Mutter Alice Stourton 6. Sie hat 1484 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Hugh Luttrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor Januar 1508 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hillが約1469年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトホーウンドストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somersetは49歳，母Alice Stourtonは6歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでHugh Luttrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1508年1月以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで死去し，イギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hill(이)가 대략 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 허운드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Stourton(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Hugh Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1508년 1월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hill nasceu aproximadamente 1469, em Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stourton, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Luttrell em 1484, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes janeiro de 1508, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.Preston Plucknett, Somerset, England: Preston Plucknett, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hill родилась около 1469 г. в местности хоундстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stourton, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Luttrell в 1484 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед январь 1508 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия.
